description: Verso: List of sums of money related to properties in the communal qodesh Fusṭāṭ, with a variety of names: Hillel b. Moshe, Avraham b. Pinḥas, Abū l-ʿAlāʾ al-ʿAsqalānī and others. The list was recorded by at least two different scribes based on the paleography. Requires further examination. (Information from FGP)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
